domIdentity.root: div.open3d-route-host[role='main'][aria-label='Planner workspace'] > Open3dNativeHost > OOPlannerWorkspace > div.open3d-workspace-root > WorkspaceShell > grid shell + canvas or 3d + panels

consoleOutput: No unexpected errors in source paths; loading uses setHydrated timeout; workspaceMessage transient.
failedRequests: None in route or component; catalog uses react-query fallback; autosave local.

interactionPerf.note: Bundle perf not measured live. See next build chunks. Keyboard via useWorkspaceKeyboard, Space temp pan implemented.

controls: CanvasToolRail: wall, opening, dimension, placement, pan, select, 2d/3d toggle
TopBar: floor selector, units dropdown (mm/cm/m/in/ft-in), undo/redo, save, export, import, view toggle
InventoryPanel: search input, category/room filters, density toggle, place drag/click
PropertiesPanel: numeric inputs for dims/transform, select, delete, lock?
LayersPanel: visibility toggles per entity type
Keyboard: Space temp pan, Esc cancel, Enter commit (pending full)
inventory.tokens: var(--planner-*) from planner-tokens.css + site core/theme.css ; no raw hex in modules
inventory.inlineStyles: dynamic only (docking positions/sizes in PanelContainer, bg in ThreeLazyViewer); static moved/audited to css
inventory.rawValues: in model defaults (wall 150mm/2400h), pureActions (door sizes), canvas (defaults); data not visual
inventory.breakpoints: PLANNER_VIEWPORT_BREAKPOINTS smallMax:768 tabletMax:1280 in useDockingSystem; css media + data-viewport; planner-tokens responsive widths
inventory.routeChrome: parent app/planner/layout.tsx provides errorboundary, sw, csrf, routechrome (hidden per rules for workspace); open3d specific layout thin + open3d-workspace.css; route-contract open3dPilot; lib/site-data/routeChromeRules hides for /planner/open3d

stateOwnership.canonicalDocument: Open3dProject + Open3dHistoryState (store/history.ts) + execute via plannerCommand only; floors/entities only
stateOwnership.view: viewMode (2d/3d), transform/zoom/pan in canvas, camera in ThreeViewerInner (local state)
stateOwnership.workspacePreference: PlannerWorkspacePreferencesV1 (density, units, lastView, grid/snap, panelRatios, collapsed) in store/workspacePreferences.ts (schema+parse); docking in useDockingSystem localStorage; not yet wired to prefs fully
stateOwnership.engine: FeasibilityCanvas internal (drawingState, snap, transform), Three (scene/camera/renderer), useRoomElements/useDoorWindowPlacement
stateOwnership.transient: activeTool, layerVisibility, paletteOpen, pendingCatalogItemId, canvasStatus, workspaceMessage (notifications), searchQuery in InventoryPanel, isLoading (catalog/hydrated), commandSearch in canvas

noteOnSeparation: Document history strictly project only. Transients live in component/useState or panel local. No leakage observed into updateProject paths. Task4 pending implementation will add explicit guards/tests.
classification: BASELINE RECORDED (analysis); live screenshots/perf/DOM console pending exec run. See Failures.md for capture skip.

BP-01 fabric@7.4.0 pin confirmed in package.json. BP-07 three+r3f only (used in 3d/). REC-03 AutoCAD command surface (status). REC-04 catalogue-first. globalStandardReview.followed: layer→surface→module per MODULE-UI-CONTRACT (L0 tokens, L1 shell css, L3 editor modules). New code only site/features/planner/open3d/. No Tailwind in open3d tsx. Phosphor icons. Bundle open3d-workspace.css. No cross-surface copy.
